2606.13311.title: Rarity-Gated Context Conditioning for Offline Imitation Learning-Based Maritime Anomaly Detection
2606.13311.paper_summary: Contextual anomaly detection aims to identify abnormal behavior conditional on context variables, but practical deployments often face highly imbalanced context distributions where rare regimes can be critical information. Under such frequency bias, context-conditioned models can produce unstable decisions and excessive false alarms in rare contexts. We propose Rarity-Gated Feature-wise Linear Modulation (RGFiLM), a rarity-aware conditioning module that combines feature-wise modulation (i.e., context-conditioned scaling and shifting of hidden features) with a gate controlled by a data-driven rarity score. The rarity score is estimated from the empirical distribution of context variables and regulates how strongly context modulates intermediate representations: the gate becomes more decisive under rare contexts while remaining conservative under frequent contexts. We evaluate RGFiLM on maritime trajectory anomaly detection using AIS motion sequences with ERA5 environmental context in an environment-sensitive detour scenario. When instantiated in a sequential anomaly scoring pipeline, RGFiLM achieves the best mean F1--False Positive Rate (FPR) trade-off among the compared context-agnostic and context-conditioned methods. These results suggest that explicitly accounting for context rarity is an effective approach for reducing false alarms in context-sensitive anomaly detection.
2606.13311.paper_summary_zh: 上下文異常檢測旨在識別基於上下文變數的異常行為，但實際部署往往面臨高度不平衡的上下文分佈，其中稀有的情況可能是關鍵信息。在這種頻率偏差下，基於上下文的模型可能會在稀有上下文中產生不穩定的決策和過多的誤報。我們提出了稀有性門控特徵線性調制（RGFiLM），這是一個考慮稀有性的調節模塊，將特徵調制（即對隱藏特徵進行上下文條件的縮放和偏移）與由數據驅動的稀有性分數控制的門結合起來。稀有性分數是根據上下文變數的經驗分佈估算的，並調節上下文對中間表示的調制強度：在稀有上下文中，門變得更加果斷，而在頻繁上下文中則保持保守。我們在使用AIS運動序列和ERA5環境上下文的環境敏感繞行場景中，對RGFiLM進行了海事軌跡異常檢測的評估。當在序列異常評分管道中實現時，RGFiLM在比較的無上下文和有上下文的方法中實現了最佳的平均F1--假陽性率（FPR）權衡。這些結果表明，明確考慮上下文稀有性是一種有效的方法，可以減少上下文敏感異常檢測中的誤報。
2606.13311.author: Yongmin Kim et.al.
2606.13311.authors: Yongmin Kim, ByeongHoon Jeon, Sungil Kim
